description: This file defines the 'AppRole' entity class for role-based access control (RBAC) within the application, representing roles stored in the 'app_role' database table. It includes fields for UUID id and role name, along with necessary constructors, getters, and setters.

classes.name: AppRole
classes.description: Entity class representing a user role for role-based access control (RBAC). It maps to the 'app_role' table and contains fields for role ID and role name.

methods.name: AppRole
methods.description: Default constructor for creating an empty AppRole instance.

methods.name: AppRole(UUID id, RoleName name)
methods.description: Parameterized constructor for initializing AppRole with specific ID and role name.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Getter for the role's UUID identifier.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Setter for the role's UUID identifier.
